RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mssql/crrel_table.tsql
RuleSet.Descr: Microsoft SQL Server Developer Edition Create Table Relations T-SQL Script
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go $iterate Relation( each maybecreate_TableRelation empty empty )$ quit
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch RelationTypeTag Superclass create_TableRelation Lookup create_TableRelation Master create_TableRelation Container create_TableRelation Owner create_TableRelation Parent create_TableRelation default empty$
/* BAD APPLICATION MODEL HAS NO RELATION COLUMNS */
